titleStmt.title: SII 27.254: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 254. (A.R. No. 60 of 1942-43.) ŚRĪŚAILAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Bell hung in a niche in the ghanṭā-maṭham.

The record states that the bell was the gift by Piriyarājayyadēva, king of Nañjarāyapaṭṭaṇa, son of Śrīkaṇṭharājayya and Vallabhājamma, for their merit and that of Vīrarājayya and all others of the Chaṅgāḷva family. The king is stated to have belonged to Sōma-vaṁśa, Ṛik-śākha and Hārita-gōtra.
It is dated Śaka 1512, Vikṛiti, Māgha śu. 15, the tithi corresponding to 1591 A.D., January 29. The details are not verifiable.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śālivāhana śaka 1512 suda . vikrutu saṁvatsarada māgha śu 3 llū . śrīmanmahā dēvadēvō
ttama śrīgi(si)riparvatada mallikārjuna
ya śāsanada vivara . jaṁgamara prasādaliṁgakke saluUdu . naṁmataṁde śrī kaṁṭharājayyagaḷu . vallabhajaṁma
navarigu . piriyarājayyanavarigo . vīrarājayya navarigū . kailāsavāgali yeṁdu . caṁgāḷa vaṁśadavare .
llākailāsakke Ayididareṁdu . pirirājayyanavaru koṭṭa gaṁṭheya sthiraśāsana . jaṁgamada prasāda liṁgake saluUdu . śrī kaṁṭharāja
yyagu . vallabharājaṁmagū . piriya rājayyagu jalmamukti vaḍeyituṭo the right of the inscription are engraved labelled figures of and Vallabhājamma respectively and below them in a horiśontal � that of Piriyarāja.
Digital edition of SII 27.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
